clEntries.7.0.7: v7.0.6: Fixed Tuya WiFi device discovery by implementing mDNS strategy, resolving pairing timeouts for local network devices., Added support for new device fingerprints across existing drivers., Updated capability mappings to correctly handle newly added device variants.
clEntries.7.0.6: Added mDNS discovery strategy for Tuya WiFi devices to fix local pairing issues. Added support for new device fingerprints. Total: 221 drivers.
clEntries.7.0.5: Fixed incorrect sensor and energy readings on WiFi Tuya devices by adding automatic divisor and multiplier resolution to the datapoint mapping engine.
clEntries.7.0.4: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v7.0.4 adds 3 new fingerprints and improves driver support.
clEntries.7.0.3: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v7.0.3 adds new device support and fixes bugs affecting users.
clEntries.7.0.2: Fixed SDK v3 flow card crashes, resolved duplicate flow IDs, and patched unlinked gang capabilities on TS0003 switches. Improved battery/energy device stability with dynamic switching and strict value filtering. Added 6 new device fingerprints.
clEntries.7.0.1: Fixed flow card crashes and device ID errors, resolved unlinked sub-gang controls on TS0003 switches, fixed duplicate flow trigger IDs, and added support for new device fingerprints.
clEntries.7.0.0: Fixed flow trigger errors, TS0003 gang linking, and energy metering. Added TS110E support, optimized HOBEIAN sensors, and improved BVB stability for radar/LCD devices.
clEntries.5.12.3: v5.12.2: Fixed energy multiplier for device _TZ3000_wzmuk9ai., Resolved connection issues for soil sensors and LCD sensors, adding new fingerprints., Added support for new device variants, enhancing compatibility with additional Zigbee devices.
clEntries.5.12.2: Universal Tuya Zigbee app v5.12.2 adds support for new device variants and resolves several fingerprint issues.
